# Free PDF Toolkit

**All PDF tools. Free. No sign up. Forever.**

[![Next.js](https://img.shields.io/badge/Next.js_14-black?style=flat&logo=next.js)](https://nextjs.org)
[![Node.js](https://img.shields.io/badge/Node.js-339933?style=flat&logo=node.js&logoColor=white)](https://nodejs.org)
[![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-3178C6?style=flat&logo=typescript&logoColor=white)](https://typescriptlang.org)
[![Tailwind CSS](https://img.shields.io/badge/Tailwind_CSS-38B2AC?style=flat&logo=tailwind-css&logoColor=white)](https://tailwindcss.com)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-E63946?style=flat)](LICENSE)

</div>

---

## What is this?

A free, fast, no-login-required PDF toolkit built to dominate Google search for PDF-related queries and monetise through Google AdSense. Every tool lives on its own dedicated SEO-optimised page so users land directly on the functionality they searched for — no navigation required.

Built module by module for quality and stability.

---

## 🎨 UI Design Preview

The site uses a dark premium theme with red gradients, glass-effect cards, and animated background blobs. Below is the live design system and logo exploration:


<object data="data:text/html;base64," type="text/html" width="100%" height="600" style="border:none;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;">
<p><em>Logo concepts — open <code>docs/logos-v2.html</code> to view interactively</em></p>
</object>

> **Note:** GitHub doesn't render embedded HTML in markdown. Open `docs/logos-v2.html` directly in your browser to view all logo concepts interactively. The design preview above renders in editors like VS Code with the Markdown Preview Enhanced extension.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🔴 Phase 1 — Core Tools (Live)

| Tool | Route | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| **Merge PDF** | `/merge-pdf` | Combine multiple PDFs into one. Drag to reorder pages before merging. |
| **Split PDF** | `/split-pdf` | Extract specific pages or split into individual files. Visual page thumbnails. |
| **Compress PDF** | `/compress-pdf` | Reduce file size with 3 quality levels. Shows before/after size comparison. |
| **PDF to Word** | `/pdf-to-word` | Convert any PDF to an editable `.docx` file. |
| **Edit PDF** | `/edit-pdf` | Add text, images, signatures, highlights and freehand drawing directly on PDF pages. |

### 🟡 Phase 2 — Coming Soon

| Tool | Route | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| **PDF to JPG** | `/pdf-to-jpg` | Export each page as a high-quality image. |
| **JPG to PDF** | `/jpg-to-pdf` | Combine images into a single PDF. |
| **Protect PDF** | `/protect-pdf` | Add password protection to any PDF. |
| **Unlock PDF** | `/unlock-pdf` | Remove password from a PDF you own. |

### 🟢 Phase 3 — Planned

| Tool | Route | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| **Watermark PDF** | `/watermark-pdf` | Add text or image watermarks to every page. |
| **Rotate PDF** | `/rotate-pdf` | Rotate individual pages or the entire document. |
| **Sign PDF** | `/sign-pdf` | Draw or type your signature and place it on any page. |

---

## 🏗️ Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology | Why |
|-------|-----------|-----|
| **Frontend** | Next.js 14 (App Router) | SSR/SSG for SEO, file-based routing per tool |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS | Single config file controls all colors and typography |
| **State** | Zustand | Lightweight global store — no Redux boilerplate |
| **HTTP** | Axios + interceptors | Centralised error handling, progress tracking |
| **Animations** | Framer Motion | Smooth, performant — no heavy animation libs |
| **Backend** | Node.js + Express | REST API for file processing |
| **PDF Merge/Split** | pdf-lib | Pure JS, runs server-side |
| **PDF Compression** | Ghostscript | System-level, best quality compression |
| **PDF to Word** | LibreOffice headless | Best conversion fidelity |
| **PDF Editor** | pdfjs-dist + fabric.js | Canvas rendering + drag/resize overlay |
| **Deployment** | Vercel + Railway | Frontend on edge CDN, backend on Railway |

---

## 🎨 Design System

All colors, typography, shadows and spacing are defined in **one place**: `tailwind.config.js`. Never hardcode hex values in component files.

```
Primary red:     #E63946
Light red:       #FF6B6B  
Dark red:        #C1121F
Background:      #080010  (deep dark purple-black)
Surface:         rgba(255,255,255,0.03)  (glass base)
```

**Glass effect recipe:** dark gradient background blobs + `backdrop-blur-glass` + semi-transparent white surface + subtle red border. The blobs behind the cards are what make glass look like glass.

---

## 📁 Project Structure

```
pdf-toolkit/
├── src/
│   ├── app/                    # Next.js App Router
│   │   ├── layout.tsx          # Root layout with Navbar, Footer, BackgroundBlobs
│   │   ├── page.tsx            # Homepage — tool grid
│   │   ├── merge-pdf/
│   │   ├── split-pdf/
│   │   ├── compress-pdf/
│   │   ├── pdf-to-word/
│   │   └── edit-pdf/
│   │
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── ui/                 # Shared: UploadZone, FileList, ProgressBar, DownloadButton, GlassCard
│   │   ├── tools/              # Tool layout, HowItWorks, FAQSection, RelatedTools
│   │   ├── layout/             # Navbar, Footer
│   │   └── home/               # HeroSection, ToolCard
│   │
│   ├── store/                  # Zustand stores
│   │   ├── useUploadStore.ts
│   │   └── useAppStore.ts
│   │
│   ├── lib/
│   │   └── axios.ts            # Axios instance + interceptors
│   │
│   ├── hooks/
│   │   ├── useFileUpload.ts
│   │   └── usePDFProcess.ts
│   │
│   └── utils/
│       ├── constants.ts        # TOOLS array — single source of tool metadata
│       ├── formatFileSize.ts
│       └── cn.ts               # clsx + tailwind-merge helper
│
├── backend/                    # Express API (separate service)
│   ├── routes/
│   ├── middleware/
│   └── utils/
│
├── docs/                       # Project documentation
│   ├── README.md               # This file
│   ├── ARCHITECTURE.md
│   ├── CURSOR_PROMPTS.md       # All Cursor build prompts
│   ├── CURSOR_REDESIGN.md      # Design system prompt
│   ├── MODULES.md              # Build order tracker
│   ├── RULES.md                # Coding rules
│   ├── SEO.md                  # SEO strategy
│   └── logos-v2.html           # Logo concepts (open in browser)
│
├── public/
│   ├── sitemap.xml
│   └── robots.txt
│
├── tailwind.config.js          ← Single source of truth for design
├── .env.local
└── package.json
```

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

### Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+
- Ghostscript installed (`brew install ghostscript` / `apt install ghostscript`)
- LibreOffice installed (for PDF to Word)

### Frontend

```bash
git clone https://github.com/yourusername/pdf-toolkit
cd pdf-toolkit
npm install
cp .env.local.example .env.local
npm run dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000)

### Backend

```bash
cd backend
npm install
cp .env.example .env
node server.js
```

Backend runs on [http://localhost:5000](http://localhost:5000)

### Environment Variables

```bash
# .env.local (frontend)
NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:5000
NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID=G-XXXXXXXXXX
NEXT_PUBLIC_ADSENSE_ID=ca-pub-XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX

# backend/.env
PORT=5000
FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:3000
MAX_FILE_SIZE=52428800
FILE_EXPIRY_MS=3600000
```

---

## 📐 Coding Rules

> These rules apply to every file. Read `docs/RULES.md` for full detail.

1. **Tailwind config is the only source of design truth** — never hardcode colors or font sizes in components
2. **Global state via Zustand** — no prop drilling, one store slice per domain
3. **All API calls via `src/lib/axios.ts`** — never import axios directly in components
4. **Component-first** — build once, reuse everywhere; `UploadZone`, `ProgressBar`, `DownloadButton` are shared across all tools
5. **Lazy-load heavy libraries** — `pdfjs-dist` and `fabric.js` use `next/dynamic` with `ssr: false`

---

## 🔒 Privacy & Security

- Uploaded files are stored in a temporary `/uploads` folder
- All files are **automatically deleted after 1 hour**
- No file contents are stored in any database
- No personal data is collected
- HTTPS enforced in production
- Rate limiting on all API routes
- PDF-only file validation with mimetype checking

---

## 📈 SEO Strategy

Each tool has its own dedicated URL targeting a specific high-volume keyword:

| Page | Target Keyword | Monthly Searches |
|------|---------------|-----------------|
| `/merge-pdf` | "merge pdf free" | 1M+ |
| `/split-pdf` | "split pdf online free" | 800K+ |
| `/compress-pdf` | "compress pdf free" | 900K+ |
| `/pdf-to-word` | "convert pdf to word free" | 2M+ |
| `/edit-pdf` | "edit pdf online free" | 1.5M+ |

Every page includes HowTo schema, FAQ schema, unique meta tags, and internal links to related tools.

---

## 💰 Monetisation

- **Google AdSense** — high-intent PDF users = strong CPM ($3–$8)
- Ad placements: sidebar (desktop), between tool and FAQ section (mobile)
- Ads never block the upload zone or download button
- Future: Pro plan, API access, white-label

---

## 🗺️ Build Modules

Track progress in `docs/MODULES.md`. Current status:

- [x] Module 1a — Scaffold + Design System
- [x] Module 1b — Navbar + Footer  
- [x] Module 1c — Homepage + Tool Cards
- [x] Module 2a — Upload Infrastructure (Zustand, Axios, UploadZone, FileList, ProgressBar)
- [ ] Module 2b — Merge PDF Frontend
- [ ] Module 2c — Merge PDF Backend
- [ ] Module 3 — Split PDF
- [ ] Module 4 — Compress PDF
- [ ] Module 5 — PDF to Word
- [ ] Module 6a — Edit PDF Canvas
- [ ] Module 6b — Edit PDF Toolbar
- [ ] Module 7 — SEO Polish
- [ ] Module 8 — Ads + Analytics
